doc_content.summary: stark-skill-analytics parses Claude Code session history and skill execution logs to derive adoption trends, success metrics, and actionable recommendations. It operates primarily as a telemetry aggregator, merging volumetric data from history.jsonl with qualitative run data to output comprehensive Markdown reports.
key_features: Line-by-line parsing of large history.jsonl files for performance
Detection of common skill invocation chains and chained workflows
Cross-referencing invoked skills against CLAUDE.md registry for ghost skill discovery
Heuristic-based recommendation engine (Fix, Promote, Remove, Sequence)
Graceful fallback if quality history files are missing (usage-only mode)

alt_text: A documentation page titled stark-skill-analytics - Internal Architecture showing a vertical flow diagram connecting Phase 1 Collect Usage Data, Phase 2 Collect Quality Data, Phase 3 Cross-Reference, and Phase 4 Generate Report, alongside data source inputs and feature details.
